body.docName: 查询公司付款账户分页列表
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/pay/account/page 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/pay/account/page 
 ## 接口描述 
公司账户查询分页列表 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"start","required":true,"label":"%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B%E6%9D%A1%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"0","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"limit","required":true,"label":"%E5%88%86%E9%A1%B5%E6%9D%A1%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"50","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"query","required":false,"label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"%7B%7D","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"payAcctName","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"xxx%E7%9A%84%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7","desc":"%20%E7%B2%BE%E7%A1%AE%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"payAcctOwnerOrgLpcCodeList","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8ID%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","exampleValue":"%5B%5D","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"lpcCode","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8ID","exampleValue":"Fx00000","desc":"%20%E7%B2%BE%E7%A1%AE%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D"}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"payAcctStatus","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E5%BC%80%E5%90%AF%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%20%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE%EF%BC%9A%0A*%201-%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8%0A*%200-%E7%A6%81%E7%94%A8%0A%0A%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0%EF%BC%9A%E7%B2%BE%E7%A1%AE%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"payAcctUseTypeList","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E7%94%A8%E9%80%94%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","exampleValue":"%5B%5D","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"useType","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E7%94%A8%E9%80%94","exampleValue":"3","desc":"%20%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE%EF%BC%9A%0A*%20%201-%E4%BB%85%E4%BB%98%E6%AC%BE%0A*%202-%E4%BB%85%E6%94%B6%E6%AC%BE%0A*%203-%E9%80%9A%E7%94%A8%0A%0A%0A%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0%EF%BC%9A%E7%B2%BE%E7%A1%AE%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D%0A"}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"accountTypeList","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","exampleValue":"%5B%5D","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","label":"%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","desc":"%20%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE%EF%BC%9A%0A*%20%20%22BANK%22%2C%20%22%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%22%0A*%20%22DIGITAL_YUAN%22%2C%20%22%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%97%E4%BA%BA%E6%B0%91%E5%B8%81%22%0A*%20%22CUSTOM%22%2C%20%22%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%22%0A%0A%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0%EF%BC%9A%E7%B2%BE%E7%A1%AE%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D","name":"accountType","exampleValue":"CUSTOM"}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"payAcctNum","required":false,"label":"%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E8%B4%A6%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"FDHGcasDSFG%3D%3D","desc":"%20%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0%EF%BC%9A%0A1.%20Base64%E5%8A%A0%E5%AF%86%0A2.%20%E7%B2%BE%E7%A1%AE%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D"}}]}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","label":"%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001","desc":"%20%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","required":true}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","exampleValue":"%7B%7D","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"list","required":false,"label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E4%BB%98%E6%AC%BE%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","exampleValue":"%5B%5D","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"payAcctBankNum","required":false,"label":"%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"001","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"payAcctBankName","required":false,"label":"%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BDxxxx%E8%A1%8C","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"payAcctBranchBankNum","required":false,"label":"%E5%88%86%E8%A1%8C%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"001124505090","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"payAcctBranchBankName","required":false,"label":"%E5%88%86%E8%A1%8C%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD%E4%BA%BA%E6%B0%91%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8Cxx%E5%8E%BF%E6%94%AF%E8%A1%8C","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"payAcctProvinceSixCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%BC%80%E6%88%B7%E5%9C%B0%E7%9C%81%E4%BB%BD%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"130000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"payAcctProvinceName","required":false,"label":"%E5%BC%80%E6%88%B7%E5%9C%B0%E7%9C%81%E4%BB%BD","exampleValue":"%E6%B2%B3%E5%8C%97%E7%9C%81","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"payAcctCitySixCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%BC%80%E6%88%B7%E5%9C%B0%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"130200","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"payAcctCityName","required":false,"label":"%E5%BC%80%E6%88%B7%E5%9C%B0%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82","exampleValue":"%E5%94%90%E5%B1%B1%E5%B8%82","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"payAcctName","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%95%B0%E5%B8%81%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7-%E9%80%9A%E7%94%A8","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"payAcctNum","required":false,"label":"%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E8%B4%A6%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"MTE3","desc":"%20%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0%EF%BC%9ABase64%E5%8A%A0%E5%AF%86"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"payAcctUseType","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E7%94%A8%E9%80%94","exampleValue":"3","desc":"%20%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE%0A*%201-%E4%BB%85%E4%BB%98%E6%AC%BE%0A*%202-%E4%BB%85%E6%94%B6%E6%AC%BE%0A*%203-%E9%80%9A%E7%94%A8"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"payAcctIsMain","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E4%B8%BB%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%20%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE%EF%BC%9A%0A*%201-%E6%98%AF%0A*%200-%E5%90%A6"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"payAcctRemark","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8","exampleValue":"%E8%BF%99%E6%98%AF%E4%B8%80%E6%9D%A1%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8%E5%91%80","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"payAcctStatus","required":false,"label":"%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%20%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE%EF%BC%9A%0A*%201-%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8%0A*%200-%E7%A6%81%E7%94%A8"}},{"elementData":{"type":"DATE","name":"crtTime","required":false,"label":"%E5%88%9B%E5%BB%BA%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"2024-04-10%2017%3A43%3A39","desc":"%20yyyy-MM-dd%20HH%3Amm%3Ass"}},{"elementData":{"type":"DATE","name":"revTime","required":false,"label":"%E4%BF%AE%E6%94%B9%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"2024-04-17%2017%3A23%3A10","desc":"%20yyyy-MM-dd%20HH%3Amm%3Ass"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"payAcctOwnerOrgLpcCode","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"Fx6000000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"payAcctOwnerOrgName","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"xx%E7%9A%84%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"accountType","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"BANK","desc":"%20%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE%EF%BC%9A%0A*%20%20%22BANK%22%2C%20%22%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7-%E5%A2%83%E5%86%85%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%22%0A*%20%22DIGITAL_YUAN%22%2C%20%22%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7-%E6%95%B0%E5%B8%81%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%22%0A*%20%22CUSTOM%22%2C%20%22%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7-%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%22%0A"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"companyName","required":false,"label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"xxx%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"wthrDigitalYuanMainAcct","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%97%E4%BA%BA%E6%B0%91%E5%B8%81%E4%B8%BB%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%20%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE%EF%BC%9A%0A*%20%201-%E6%98%AF%0A*%200-%E5%90%A6"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"customFieldValues","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFieldCode","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"DATE_112244526","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFieldValue","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"%E5%90%B1%E5%90%B1%E5%90%B1","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFieldName","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E5%A2%83%E5%86%85%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E7%9A%84%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F%E9%80%89%E6%8B%A9%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"multiValues","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%9A%E9%80%89%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"%7B%7D","desc":"%20%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E5%A4%9A%E9%80%89"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"id","label":"%E5%A4%9A%E9%80%89%E7%9A%84%E5%80%BC%20key","exampleValue":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B91"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"name","label":"%E5%A4%9A%E9%80%89%E7%9A%84%E6%98%BE%E7%A4%BA%20text","exampleValue":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B91"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"code","label":"%E5%A4%9A%E9%80%89%E7%9A%84%20%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"option1"}}]}]}],"open":false},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"totalCount","required":false,"label":"%E6%80%BB%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"2256","desc":""}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 #### 请求报文
```json
{
    "start": 0,
    "limit": 50,
    "query": {
        "payAcctName": "",
        "payAcctOwnerOrgLpcCodeList": [
            "Fx6000000"
        ],
        "payAcctStatus": "1",
        "accountTypeList": [
            "BANK"
        ],
        "payAcctUseTypeList": [],
        "payAcctNum": ""
    }
}
```
#### 响应报文
```json
{
    "data": {
        "list": [
            {
                "payAcctBankNum": "001",

                "payAcctName": "好烦好烦-通用",

                "payAcctUseType": "3",

                "payAcctStatus": "1",

                "revTime": "2024-04-17 17:23:10",

                    {

                        "customFieldCode": "MULTI_SELECT_112147085",

                            {
                                "id": "选项1",
```  

## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|是否成功
  | --- | --- |---|
  | success|true|是|




除success为true的情况全部是失败
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/pay/account/page

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/pay/account/page

接口描述

公司账户查询分页列表

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON
